zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem於1070年出生在義大利時，她的父親Manfredo Del Vasto30歲，母親Adelasia de Polento21歲。她於1087年與Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE在義大利西西利亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1118年4月16日在義大利西西利亞梅西那帕蒂享年48歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞梅西那帕蒂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem于1070年出生在意大利时，她的父亲Manfredo Del Vasto30岁，母亲Adelasia de Polento21岁。她于1087年与Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE在意大利西西利亞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1118年4月16日在意大利西西利亞梅西那帕蒂享年48岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞梅西那帕蒂。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Fernando, Angel, Arnando, Arturo, Carlos, Dominga, Enrique, Jairo, Luis, Luz, Sergio.  Italian Carmine, Dante, Giro, Giuseppe, Michelangelo, Nunzi.

Spanish and Italian: ethnic name from vasco ‘Basque’, denoting someone from the Basque Country, or from a Spanish byname or Italian personal name of the same derivation. The inhabitants of this region, which extends between southern France and northern Spain, are first recorded in Latin sources as the Vascones, a word of unexplained etymology. See also Gascoigne . The Basques’ own name for themselves is Euskaldun. Compare Basco .
Spanish and Portuguese: old personal name corresponding to   Velasco  .

variants.name: Vasquez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Mario, Jorge, Pedro, Guadalupe.
Spanish (also Vásquez): patronymic from the personal name Vasco .

variants.name: Gascoigne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Gascon, Middle English Gascoun, Gascon ‘Gascon, native of Gascony’ or the adjective Gascuinz ‘of Gascony’. The name of the region derives from that of the Basques, who are found close by and formerly extended into this region as well; they are first named in Roman sources as Vascōnes, but the original meaning of the name derived from a root eusk- in the non-Indo-European language that they still speak today, is completely obscure. By the Middle Ages the Basques had been displaced from most of Gascony by speakers of Gascon (a dialect of Occitan, related to French), who were proverbial for their boastfulness. In the 11th century Gascony united with Aquitaine and was thus held by England between 1154 and 1453.

variants.name: Vasques
meanings: Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Vasco  .

variants.name: Vaz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Antonio, Manuel, Luis, Alfredo, Alvaro, Joaquin, Jorge, Mario, Victorio, Adriano, Aires, Amandio.  Portuguese Joao, Damiao, Afonso, Henrique, Joaquim, Ligia, Nelio, Paulo.
Portuguese: patronymic from   Vasco  . This surname is also found on the west coast of India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem was born in 1070, in Italy, her father, Manfredo Del Vasto, was 30 and her mother, Adelasia de Polento, was 21. She married Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE in 1087, in Sicily, Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 April 1118, in Patti, Messina, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 48, and was buried in Patti, Messina, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem est née en 1070, à Italie, son père, Manfredo Del Vasto, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adelasia de Polento, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE en 1087, à Sicile, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1118, à Patti, Messina, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Patti, Messina, Sicile, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem 1070 in Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Manfredo Del Vasto 30 und ihre Mutter Adelasia de Polento 21. Sie hat 1087 in Sizilien, Italien Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. April 1118 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Patti, Messina, Sizilien, Italien und wurde in Patti, Messina, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem è nata il nel 1070 nel Italia, sua padre, Manfredo Del Vasto, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adelasia de Polento, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE nel 1087, nel Sicilia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 aprile 1118, nel Patti, Messina, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Patti, Messina, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalemが1070年にイタリアで生まれた時，父Manfredo Del Vastoは30歳，母Adelasia de Polentoは21歳であった。1087年にイタリアシシリアでRoger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1118年4月16日にイタリアシシリアメシナプアッティで48歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアメシナプアッティにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem(이)가 1070년 이탈리아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Manfredo Del Vasto(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelasia de Polento(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1087년 이탈리아 시실리야에서 Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 4월 16일 이탈리아 시실리야 메시나 패티에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 메시나 패티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem nasceu em 1070, em Itália, seu pai, Manfredo Del Vasto, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adelasia de Polento, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE em 1087, em Sicilia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de abril de 1118, em Patti, Messina, Sicilia, Itália, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Patti, Messina, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem родилась в 1070 г. в местности Италия, её отцу по имени Manfredo Del Vasto было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelasia de Polento, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE в 1087 г. в местности сисиля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 апреля 1118 г. в местности патти, мессина, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности патти, мессина, сисиля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelasia del Vasto Comtesse consort de Sicile et Reine de Jérusalem nació en 1070, en Italia, su papá, Manfredo Del Vasto, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adelasia de Polento, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Roger I de HAUTEVILLE Comte de SICILE en 1087, en Sicilia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de abril de 1118, en Patti, Messina, Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Patti, Messina, Sicilia, Italia.
